testcase.name: Home Page E2E Tests › should display the hero section correctly
Home Page E2E Tests › should display main navigation elements
Home Page E2E Tests › should have working navigation links

failure.message: home.spec.ts:32:3 should have working navigation links

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › home.spec.ts:32:3 › Home Page E2E Tests › should have working navigation links ──────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: Timed out 10000ms waiting for expect(locator).toHaveURL(expected)
Locator: locator(':root') Expected pattern: /\/projects/ Received string: "http://localhost:3000/" Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator(':root') 4 × locator resolved to <html lang="en">…</html> - unexpected value "http://localhost:3000/"
39 | // Try clicking with force to bypass overlay issues temporarily 40 | await projectsLink.click({ force: true }); > 41 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/projects/); | ^ 42 | await page.goBack(); 43 | } 44 | at D:\Nuxt Projects\llm-dev-agent\cloudless.gr\playwright\tests\home.spec.ts:41:26
Retry #1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: expect(locator).toHaveURL(expected)
Locator: locator(':root') Expected pattern: /\/projects/ Received string: "http://localhost:3000/" Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator(':root') 3 × locator resolved to <html lang="en">…</html> - unexpected value "http://localhost:3000/"
39 | // Try clicking with force to bypass overlay issues temporarily 40 | await projectsLink.click({ force: true }); > 41 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/\/projects/); | ^ 42 | await page.goBack(); 43 | } 44 | at D:\Nuxt Projects\llm-dev-agent\cloudless.gr\playwright\tests\home.spec.ts:41:26

npx playwright show-trace playwright\test-results\home-Home-Page-E2E-Tests-s-42768-ve-working-navigation-links-chromium-retry1\trace.zip

testcase.name: Home Page E2E Tests › should display login/register options for unauthenticated users
Home Page E2E Tests › should be responsive on mobile devices
Home Page E2E Tests › should have proper page title and meta tags
Home Page E2E Tests › should load without JavaScript errors
Home Page E2E Tests › should have accessible content
Home Page E2E Tests › should handle keyboard navigation
